title: Fried Algerian Vine Leaves Stir-fry
description: This tangy and creamy dish features fried vine leaves with a mix of vegetables for an adventurous vegetarian-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: vine leaves
ingredients.amount: 1 cup fresh, cleaned and roughly chopped
ingredients.notes: ensure they are thoroughly washed to remove any bitterness

ingredients.name: onion
ingredients.notes: use white or yellow onions for better flavor

ingredients.name: garlic cloves
ingredients.notes: adjust based on preference and taste sensitivity

ingredients.name: lemon juice
ingredients.notes: to balance the saltiness and add a citrus twist

ingredients.name: salt
ingredients.notes: adjust to taste, considering already salty vine leaves

ingredients.name: bell pepper
ingredients.notes: adds a bit of color and crunch to the dish

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Stir in tomato paste, lemon juice, salt, and continue cooking for another minute to meld flavors.
Fold in the vine leaves and bell pepper. Cover the pan and cook for about 10 minutes or until the leaves are tender but still have some bite.
Garnish with fresh herbs if available (optional).
